Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Myria]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== House of Blades ==
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 1''' — Myria is a place that can be reached by riding.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 2''' — Myria is a village encircled by head-high wooden walls made of sharp sticks.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 2''' — The village of Myria is located near a desert.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 2''' — Myria is a village with a north gate.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 2''' — Myria is a village located on flat and sandy plains.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 4''' — Alin has been in Myria.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 5''' — Myria is a village that suffered scorched ruins.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 8''' — Myria is a location.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 11''' — The entrance to Orgrith Cave is wide enough that half the people of Myria could fit inside.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 12''' — The rocky bluffs around Myria are similar to the stone walls in the chamber.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 14''' — Myria is a location near the northwestern edge of the Latari Forest.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 17''' — Myria is a place from which Alin's party originates.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 17''' — Myria is a destination the people can be taken back to.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 22''' — Myria is a destination Simon's group intended to reach.}}

== The Crimson Vault ==
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 1''' — Myria is a village near the Latari Forest.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 2''' — Simon intended to free his friends from Myria.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 5''' — Myria is a village.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 8''' — Leah spent years in Myria.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 13''' — In Myria, Simon is the same person to Leah as he is to Alin or others in the village.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 14''' — Myria has watchmen and gates.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 14''' — Alin used a simple cot back in Myria.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 17''' — The back of the Damascan army might reach all the way to Myria.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 23''' — Myria is a location Alin entered via the Naraka Gate.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 24''' — Myria is a village that was raided by Damascans and attacked by an Endross Traveler.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 24''' — The battles between the City of Light residents and Naraka creatures echo in the village of Myria.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 24''' — The Naraka Incarnation fought on the sand of Myria.}}

== City of Light ==
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 4''' — Myria was burned by the Naraka Incarnation.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 10''' — A girl Simon sees reminds him of Myria.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 27''' — Myria is a location where Alin once opened the Gates to Elysia.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
